description: A user reports they cannot log in to the TOS. A helpdesk agent must resolve the issue.

nodes.task_description: Receive the helpdesk ticket from the user.

expected_outcome.value: The agent gets a ticket stating 'Cannot log in to TOS'.

nodes.task_description: Check the user's account status in the user management system.

expected_outcome.value: The agent finds the user's password has expired.

nodes.task_description: Reset the user's password and provide them with a temporary one, instructing them to change it upon first login.

expected_outcome.value: The agent resets the password and communicates the solution to the user, then closes the ticket.
